Inference   Owner  Delta  Cost     Driver
Tc1-2/inf2  main   +1.5k  $0.0004  user prompt
Tc2-2/inf2  main   +400   $0.0000  user prompt
Tc1-3/inf3  main   +200   $0.0001  user prompt

# token / cost figures are approximate (bytes/4 for tool results,
# cache-read rate for cost). Compaction rows surface separately and
# never appear as negative deltas.
